items.title: Oil tanker hijacked off coast of Yemen and taken towards Somalia
items.dek: It is the second time an oil tanker has been hijacked in the area in the past 10 days.
items.body: It is the second time an oil tanker has been hijacked in the area in the past 10 days.

items.title: Taiwan president visits Eswatini days after blaming China for cancelled trip
items.dek: It is unclear how he reached Eswatini. China described his visit as a "stowaway-style escape farce".
